Findings.Remediation: Implement rate limiting on /api/v1/auth/login. Use express-rate-limit: app.use('/login', rateLimit({ windowMs: 15*60*1000, max: 10 })). Add account lockout after N failed attempts.

Findings.Evidence: 20 failed login attempts against admin account without lockout
Findings.Remediation: Implement account lockout after 5-10 failed attempts. Consider progressive delays (exponential backoff) before full lockout.
